calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-14-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patrick Heard. Steven Williams, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff and defendant Margaret Guzallis appeared in pro per. The case settled per written stipulation of the parties and not placed on the record. Trial date is vacated.
